name: Get Call Lineage from Invoca to Five9 to LP

content.query:
SELECT distinct 
[Call Record ID] as InvocaCallRecordID
,[Call Start Time] as InvocaCallDate
,[Media Type] as InvocaMediaType
,[Promo Number Description] as InvocaPromoNumberDescription
,[Call Segment Path] as InvocaCallSegmentPath
,[Final Campaign] as InvocaFinalCampaign
,[Total Duration] as InvocaTotalDuration
,[Total Connected Duration] as InvocaTotalConnectedDuration
,[Total IVR Duration] as InvocaTotalIVRDuration
,inv.[City] as InvocaCity
,[Region] as InvocaRegion
,[Caller ID] as InvocaCallerID
,[Phone Type] as InvocaPhoneType
,[Signal Names] as InvocaSignalNames
,[CALL ID] as Five9CallID
,[TIMESTAMP] as Five9CallDate
,[CAMPAIGN] as Five9Campaign
,[CALL TYPE] as Five9CallType
,f9.[DISPOSITION] as Five9Disposition
,[CALL TIME] as Five9CallTime
,[CallID] as LPCallID
,[CallTypeID] as LPCallTypeID
,[CallResultID] as LPCallResultID
,[CallDate] as LPCallDate
,lds.LeadID as LPLeadID
,cls.CustomerID as LPCustomerID
,lds.EntryDate as LPEntryDate
,lds.LeadSourceID as LPLeadSourceID
,lds.LeadSubSourceID as LPLeadSubSourceID
,srs.LeadSubSource as LPLeadSubSource
,lds.DispositionID as LPDispositionID
,dsp.Disposition as LPDisposition
,cls.[Division] as LPDivision
FROM 
[ODS].[INVOCA_FHI_CALLS] inv
left join [ODS].[FIVE9_FHI_CALLS] f9
on REPLACE(inv.[Caller ID],'-','') = f9.[ANI]
left join  [EDW].[FACT_CALL] cls
on REPLACE(inv.[Caller ID],'-','') = cls.[Phone]
left join  [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
on cls.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
left join [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
on cst.CustomerID = lds.CustomerID
left join [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs
on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
left join [EDW].[DIM_DISPOSITION] dsp
on lds.DispositionID = dsp.DispositionID
WHERE
[Media Type] = 'Offline: Direct Mail'
